picks.narrative: Starter quality differential drives this pick: Sean Newcomb (4.07 xFIP) has a measurable edge over Troy Melton (4.88 xFIP, 2.81 ERA — outperforming their process stats) — model prices CHW at 56.4% to win; Pinnacle implies 46.9% (+113) — a 9.5-point gap. Model inputs solid, no critical gaps.
